headline: Shell-Led LNG Canada Gets Preliminary Nod for Phase Two Expansion
summary: SHEL-led LNG Canada advances Phase Two with early contractor work, positioning the project for a potential capacity doubling ahead of a final investment decision in 2026.

headline: Marathon Petroleum Corp (NYSE:MPC) Technical Breakout Setup Scores Perfect 10 for Momentum and 9 for Consolidation
summary: A technical breakout strategy targets stocks with strong momentum and tight consolidation. Marathon Petroleum (MPC) scores a perfect 10 technical rating and 9 setup rating, making it a high-probability breakout candidate with defined risk levels.
